Portfolio Project · 3D Urban Analytics
Interactive CesiumJS Demo
Shanghai Urban Solar Explorer

A portfolio-ready 3D city demo that visualizes building-level solar irradiance in Lujiazui, supports hourly time playback, and lets users inspect individual buildings inside an interactive Cesium scene.

Buildings—
Time Steps—
CoverageLujiazui
FormatStandalone HTML
CesiumJS GeoJSON Buildings Solar Analytics Timeline Playback Portfolio UI
What this demonstrates
  • 3D urban scene construction from embedded building footprints and height attributes.
  • Building-level solar performance storytelling through color mapping, hover labels, and click inspection.
  • A self-contained front-end artifact that can be shown directly on GitHub Pages as a project sample.
How to interact
  • Scrub the Cesium timeline or press play to explore hourly irradiance changes.
  • Click any building to open detailed power metrics in the info panel.
  • Use the quick actions below to reset the camera or pause the temporal animation.
Built with CesiumJS · Pre-computed ray-casting occlusion + ERBS irradiance decomposition · 1,296 buildings · Data: OSM + real weather records
